kadayf-with-pistachio-lezzet.name: Kadayif With Pistachio
instructions: 1. Like the recipes of the flavor sweet recipes also very interesting.
2. Cook until you get to the pot of water and sugar.
3. Add lemon juice and leave it from the stove and cool.
4. melt the butter.
5. Take the dough into a wide tray and cut the wire wire by making it with your hands.
6. Pour the butter on it.
7. thoroughly rub the oil with your hands to thoroughly pull.
8. Take the dough into two.
9. lubricate 35 cm aluminum tray.
10. The half of the dough is pressed on the bottom of the tray by pressing and compression.
11. 11. Spread the pot.
12. The remaining chamfer is broadcast on the walnuts or by pressing well with your hands.
13. Cook until the oven with 180 degrees is fryinge.
14 July Pour cold porridge on hot dessert.
15. Cover the tray above 1 hour.
16. Decorate and serve peek.
17.  Afiyet olsun.
18. For a different taste, you can also try peanut kadayif recipe.

kale-and-cannellini-soup.name: Kale And Cannellini Soup

ingredients.item: Cooking liquid from cannellini beans with kale

instructions: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat. Add carrot and celery; sauté until starting to soften, about 5 minutes. Add cooking liquid, beans, tomatoes with juice, 3 tablespoons cheese, garlic, and Italian seasoning. Simmer, uncovered, 30 minutes. Puree 2 cups soup in blender. Return puree to pot.
Ladle soup into bowls; top with toasts. Drizzle truffle oil over; sprinkle with cheese.

kale-salad.name: Kale Salad

ingredients.prep: ribs discarded and leaves cut into thin strips

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place kale in a large serving bowl; add 1 teaspoon olive oil and 2 pinches salt. Gently massage oil and salt into kale. Set aside to allow kale to soften, about 10 minutes.

To make the dressing: Combine 1/4 cup olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, maple syrup, cumin, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper for vinaigrette in a plastic or glass container with a lid. Cover the container and vigorously shake until dressing is light yellow and evenly combined.
Layer carrots, roasted corn, tortilla chips, almonds, and smoked cheese on top of kale.
Drizzle vinaigrette over salad; mix with tongs until evenly distributed. Gently stir chopped eggs into salad.

kansas-baked-beans.name: Kansas Baked Beans
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add bacon, ground beef, and onion; cook until bacon and ground beef completely browned, 7 to 10 minutes. Drain any excess fat; transfer to a casserole dish.

Stir white sugar, brown sugar, ketchup, barbecue sauce, mustard, molasses, chili powder, and black pepper together in a bowl; pour over bacon mixture. Add pork and beans, kidney beans, and butter beans; mix thoroughly.
Bake in the preheated oven until liquid thickens, about 1 hour.

kentucky-buck-cocktail.name: Kentucky Buck Cocktail
instructions: Gently muddle the strawberries with the Simple Syrup in a cocktail shaker. Add the bourbon, lemon juice, and Angostura bitters, then fill with ice and shake vigorously for 10–15 seconds. Double strain into a highball glass filled with fresh ice and top with the ginger beer. Garnish with a fresh strawberry.

kheer-saffron-supreme.name: Kheer: Saffron Supreme
instructions: Rinse the rice until the water runs clear. Soak the rice in water for 20–30 minutes, then drain.

In a medium heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat, combine the coconut milk and cardamom. Bring the milk to a gentle simmer, then add the drained rice. Simmer, stirring occasionally so the rice does not stick to the bottom, until the milk is reduced by half and the rice is tender, about 30 minutes.
Add the sugar and stir until it dissolves. Remove the pot from the heat and stir in the saffron threads.
Serve the kheer topped with golden raisins and slivered almonds.
Enjoy!

kid-approved-banana-bread.name: Kid-approved Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a loaf pan.

Beat brown sugar and butter together using an electric mixer in a mixing bowl until creamy. Add egg and beat on medium-high speed until mixture is light and fluffy, 1 to 2 minutes. Mash bananas using a fork and add to mixture, beating just until mixture is fairly smooth (some lumps are okay).

Combine all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl. Blend into banana mixture until just combined. Fold in chocolate chips. Pour into the prepared loaf pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour. Remove from the oven and let cool 5 minutes; turn pan over to release loaf and let cool further on a wire rack. Tastes best warm.

kid-friendly-fruit-salad.name: Kid-friendly Fruit Salad

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into bite-size pieces

instructions: Combine pineapple, orange, apple, red grapes, and green grapes together in a bowl.
Add yogurt; stir to coat.

kimchi-egg.name: Kimchi Egg
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet or wok over medium heat. Cook kimchi in hot oil until softened, about 2 minutes; add eggs. Cook and stir eggs and kimchi together until eggs are set, 2 to 3 minutes.

king-cake-with-chocolate-argiro.name: King Cake With Chocolate

ingredients.item: Some butter for the baking pan
Some butter for the baking pan

instructions: Make sure all materials are at room temperature.
We butter a 35 cm baking pan, and we put parchment paper on the base (for easy dissipation).
Heat the amareto, and pour in our chopped dried fruit.
Cover and allow to stand for 15 minutes, soften the fruits and cool the liqueur.
Melt the couverture and set aside to cool.
Shake the flower with the baking powder in a bowl.
In the mixer's bowl or with hand mixer, beat the soft button with the sugar to fluffy.
Our mixture must be made cream and melt the sugar well. It takes five minutes straight.
Add the eggs one at a time (drink them), and then add the vanillas.
The more time we beat the eggs in the mixer, the more the egg's small is lost by the dessert.
Add the melted lukewarm chocolate, the fruits with liqueur, almond, hazelnuts and salt.
Ultimately gently, intercorporate the sifted flower with the baking powder.
Pour the mixture into the ready baking pan.
We're going in.

knowltons-pimiento-cheese.name: Knowlton's Pimiento Cheese

ingredients.item: Diced drained pimiento peppers from a jar
ingredients.prep: roasted red peppers, or piquillo peppers (about 2 0.5 ounces)
crackers, or sliced white bread (for serving)

instructions: Using a fork, mash cheeses, mayonnaise, peppers, and cayenne in a medium bowl until well blended. Season with salt and pepper. Cover and chill until cold, at least 2 hours and up to 3 days.
Serve pimiento cheese with celery sticks and crackers, or, if desired, spread between 2 slices of white bread and cut diagonally to make 4 sandwich triangles.
